plugins.prepareCmd: mvn versions:set -DnewVersion='${nextRelease.version}' -DgenerateBackupPoms=false && sed -i 's|image: .*:v.*|image: ghcr.io/lookmail88/xg-tlsa-svc:v${nextRelease.version}|g' k8s/dev/deployment.yaml && sed -i 's|image: .*:v.*|image: ghcr.io/lookmail88/xg-tlsa-svc:v${nextRelease.version}|g' k8s/prod/deployment.yaml
